text: Make agent retries of Ledger writes safe and deterministic. Evidence: analogous — agent processes can lose output after a committed write, and RISK-LEDGER-001/004 require duplicate-safe recovery; workflows UC-LEDGER-002 and UC-LEDGER-006.
target: Reusing an idempotency identity with identical facts returns the existing result without a second mutation; conflicting reuse returns a stable conflict and preserves the original.
